overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a foggy, futuristic environment with massive holographic structures. The scene features neon teal and purple lighting, with the character navigating through ruins and approaching various glowing architectural elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: teal holographic corridor with horizontal light strips

agents.ego_description: running alongside a massive teal holographic wall with horizontal light strips, navigating through foggy terrain

entered.detail: large curved structure with glowing horizontal cyan light strips
vertical purple light beams extending into the foggy sky
broken metallic structures barely visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrow corridor formed by a massive teal holographic wall on the left, with purple aurora lights visible above. The ground is covered in sparse grass and the atmosphere is thick with fog, limiting visibility to the ruins in the distance.

events.description: exiting the narrow teal corridor into an open foggy valley with expanded visibility
large circular building with glowing orange columns becomes visible on the left, adding warm light to the scene

agents.ego_description: running through the open foggy valley toward distant holographic structures and a bright light source ahead

entered.detail: large holographic structure with classical columns emitting orange light
intense greenish-white light glowing through the fog at the valley's end

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide foggy valley as the character leaves the teal corridor behind. A massive circular building with glowing orange columns appears on the left, while a bright green light shines in the distance ahead. The teal wall recedes into the background on the left.

events.description: purple holographic tower becomes prominent on the right, shifting focus from the circular building

agents.ego_description: running past the circular columned building and turning slightly toward the massive purple holographic tower

entered.detail: tall rectangular structure with horizontal purple energy lines and glowing edges
dark silhouettes of palm trees against the bright background light

segments.scene_description: The character passes the circular building with orange columns as it recedes into the distance on the left. A massive purple holographic tower emerges on the right, becoming the new focal point. The lighting shifts to mix orange and purple hues as the character runs toward the tower.

events.description: purple light intensifies and dominates the scene as character approaches the tower base

agents.ego_description: approaching the base of the massive purple holographic tower, moving between the tower and surrounding ruins

entered.detail: lower architectural details and foundation of the purple tower with glowing edges

segments.scene_description: The character closes in on the purple holographic tower, which now dominates the center of the frame. The circular building and bright green light fade from view as the purple glow intensifies. The space narrows between the tower and surrounding structures, with the tower's horizontal energy lines becoming clearly visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined holographic corridor into a vast, fog-shrouded valley. It begins with the character running alongside a massive teal holographic wall under a sky filled with purple aurora lights, where thick fog obscures the surrounding ruins. As the character moves forward, the restrictive teal wall recedes into the background, allowing the environment to open up into a wide expanse. The scene then shifts to reveal a massive circular building with glowing orange columns on the left, while a bright green light emerges in the distance ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a warm, orange-lit architectural space toward the overwhelming glow of a massive purple holographic tower. It begins as the character passes a circular building with orange columns that recedes into the distance on the left, allowing a towering purple hologram to emerge on the right as the new focal point. As the character runs forward, the lighting blends orange and purple hues before the circular building and a bright green light fade entirely from view. The scene then narrows between the tower and surrounding structures, causing the purple glow to intensify and dominate the center of the frame. Finally, the camera closes in on the holographic structure, bringing its intricate horizontal energy lines into clear view.
